chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.371 of 2023 Pakistan International Airlines Corporation Ltd. Versus Fayyaz Ali Shah Masoomi & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 4529/23 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 4530/23 Dated: 25.01.2024 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui for appellant. Respondent No.1 present in person in terms of statutory notice. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellant submits that he has filed his detailed defence in shape of counter-affidavit in relation to the pending application before learned Single Judge, however, since the impugned order is only an ad-interim order in all fairness he would not press this appeal but seek some indulgence that the application pending before learned Single Judge be decided at the earliest considering the defence that he has taken. Since reasonable submission has been made by the learned counsel, which has also not been opposed by respondent No.1 who is the main contesting party in the proceedings and present in terms of statutory notice, this appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed applications. It is expected that the pending application before learned Single Judge may be decided on merits in consideration of the pleadings of the parties at the earliest. Judge Judge
